message:
fix(fusion,ops): harden refresh worker indexing and SLO config validation

Replace unchecked `fast_embeddings[i]` with defensive `.get(i)` in
RefreshWorker::embed_batch to prevent panic when an embedder override
returns fewer vectors than inputs. On mismatch, the affected doc is
requeued for retry next cycle with proper metrics and logging.

Add `min_requests >= 1` validation to SloMaterializationConfig to
close a theoretical NaN path from `0/0` division in SLO evaluation
when misconfigured with `min_requests = 0`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
